## Type of change
- [ ] Backwards-compatible addition (new optional field)
- [ ] Breaking change (required field, type change, removal)

## Proposed change
Describe what you want to change and why:

## Impact
Which patterns or tooling would be affected?

## Draft schema diff
If possible, show the before/after JSON Schema snippet:
